S.FORM: Jason Alexander kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Jason Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *as~ɕon alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *as~ɕon alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: *as~ɕon alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *as~ɕon alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
